title: Allay Girls
description: This texture pack transforms the Allays into Allay Girls
body:
This texture pack transforms the Allays into Allay Girls with a feminine and stylized appearance while keeping their original cute and magical essence.
Each Allay has been redesigned with a custom model and detailed textures, giving them expressive faces, soft proportions, and themed outfits.

There is a 61.54% chance of spawning a default Allay Girl and a 30.77% chance of getting one with a custom skin.
Each custom skin has a 7.69% individual chance. More skins are planned for future updates.

It requires Custom Entity Models (CEM) to work properly — either through a compatible version of OptiFine, or by using the ETF (Entity Texture Features) and EMF (Entity Model Features) mods.

Compatible with Minecraft versions higher and lower than 1.21.
